channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Samsung Redesigns Foldable Future With Galaxy Z Fold 8, Fold 8 Ultra and Z Flip 8 Launch
item.description:
Samsung has launched its expanded Galaxy Z foldable lineup featuring the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra and Galaxy Z Flip 8, introducing wider designs, AI-powered features and upgraded hardware as competition in the premium smartphone market increases
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/technology/samsung-galaxy-z-fold-8-ultra-z-flip-8-launch-2026
